message:
test(e2e): add 5 E2E integration test suites (27 tests total)

- e2e_web: route resolution, nested routing, response types, query extraction, errors
- e2e_signal: graceful shutdown, multi-receiver, concurrent shutdown, signal kinds
- e2e_messaging: MPSC, broadcast, watch, oneshot channels with backpressure
- e2e_database: pool lifecycle, concurrent access, stats, close, discard
- e2e_transport: TCP echo/multi-client/large transfer, UDP bidirectional

Closes bd-2vmf, bd-3r8q, bd-1a2s, bd-221j, bd-1vyu, bd-19q3, bd-2lbq (epic)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
